non_blocking_findings.summary: Explicitly list root-retained helpers such as blockersFrom, hasHumanBlocker, nextStepFrom, context-pack seed, fallback, snapshot id, and snapshot publish plan.
Document allowed acyclic imports from root to reviewer/work-packages and from work-packages to reviewer.
Place normalizeRequirementPlanWorkPackages in the work-packages module with its sole caller.
Add test/autonomous-scheduler-loop.test.js to the focused gate list.
Set a concrete root target of no more than 400 lines to leave headroom below the 500-line ceiling.

decision.summary: DeepSeek found no blocking architectural defect in the LFA-P29 extraction map. It confirmed the module graph is acyclic, the public export map covers all 10 current exports, the named behavior domains are assigned, and the focused gate list covers the main direct tests and integration points after the requested scheduler-loop gate addition.
